text.title: Conflict Resolution Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: collaborating-mode NVC message addressing repeated late deploy approvals.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Author has a recurring 14h-late deploy approval problem with a peer-team lead. High stakes, high relationship.

section.title: Output
section.code: { "tk_mode": "collaborating", "observation": "In the last 3 sprints the deploy ticket I assigned was returned without comments 14h after the SLA.", "feeling": "I feel frustrated and uncertain about how to plan next sprint.", "need": "predictability and clarity on shared deliverables", "request": "Would you commit to a 4h response window during business hours starting next Monday, or propose an alternative we both agree to by Friday?" }
